meta.title: 性别平等与职场
meta.description: Upper-intermediate gender equality in the workplace vocabulary and grammar in Chinese: discrimination, glass ceiling, and equal pay.
meta.description_ko: 중국어 중급~중상급 직장 내 성평등 어휘와 문형: 차별, 유리천장, 동일임금.

questions.prompt: 「性别歧视」是什么意思？(What does 性别歧视 mean?)

explanation.en: 「玻璃天花板」(bōli tiānhuābǎn) means "glass ceiling", an invisible barrier to advancement.
explanation.ko: 「玻璃天花板」(bōli tiānhuābǎn)는 승진을 가로막는 보이지 않는 장벽을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「玻璃天花板」是什么意思？(What does 玻璃天花板 mean?)

explanation.en: 「同工同酬」(tónggōng tóngchóu) means "equal pay for equal work".

questions.prompt: 「同工同酬」是什么意思？(What does 同工同酬 mean?)
choices: 同工同酬(equal pay for equal work)

questions.prompt: 「产假」是什么意思？(What does 产假 mean?)
「女性领导力」是什么意思？(What does 女性领导力 mean?)
职场中的___依然是一个普遍存在的问题，需要引起重视。(Gender discrimination in the workplace is still a widespread problem that needs attention.)
很多女性在职业发展中会遇到___，很难晋升到高层职位。(Many women encounter a glass ceiling in their career development, finding it hard to be promoted to senior positions.)

explanation.en: 「同工同酬」means "equal pay for equal work".

questions.prompt: 这家公司承诺实现___，消除性别薪资差距。(This company promised to achieve equal pay for equal work, eliminating the gender pay gap.)
公司为女性员工提供了六个月的带薪___。(The company provides female employees with six months of paid maternity leave.)
越来越多的企业开始重视培养___，任用更多女性担任高管。(More and more enterprises are starting to emphasize cultivating female leadership, appointing more women to senior management.)
尽管性别平等观念不断普及，___职场中的性别差距依然存在。(Although the concept of gender equality is becoming increasingly widespread, gender gaps in the workplace still exist.)
无论男性还是女性，___应该享有平等的职业发展机会。(Whether male or female, everyone should have equal career development opportunities.)
除非企业彻底改变用人观念，___性别歧视问题很难得到根本解决。(Unless enterprises fundamentally change their hiring mindset, gender discrimination will be hard to fundamentally solve.)
这家公司之所以能吸引优秀的女性人才，___是因为营造了公平的职场环境。(This company was able to attract outstanding female talent precisely because it created a fair workplace environment.)

explanation.en: 「一方面〜另一方面〜」means "on one hand 〜, on the other hand 〜".
explanation.ko: 「一方面〜另一方面〜」는 '한편으로는 ~, 다른 한편으로는 ~'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 一方面企业要打破性别偏见，___方面也要建立完善的晋升机制。(On one hand enterprises need to break gender bias, on the other hand they also need to establish a comprehensive promotion mechanism.)
这项政策___了女性在职场中面临的诸多障碍。(This policy addressed many obstacles that women face in the workplace.)
这家公司___了灵活的工作制度，帮助女性平衡工作与家庭。(This company introduced a flexible work system, helping women balance work and family.)
消除性别歧视需要全社会共同___，而不只是某个部门的责任。(Eliminating gender discrimination requires the joint effort of the whole society, not just the responsibility of a single department.)
这项调查___了职场性别不平等的严重程度。(This survey revealed the severity of gender inequality in the workplace.)
越来越多的公司开始___多元化的招聘政策，鼓励女性应聘管理岗位。(More and more companies are starting to implement diversified recruitment policies, encouraging women to apply for management positions.)

explanation.en: 「都」must come before 应该 (should): 都应该 (not 应该都).
explanation.ko: 「都」는 '应该' 앞에 와야 하므로 '都应该'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 职场中的性别歧视依然是普遍存在的一个问题，需要引起重视。(Gender discrimination in the workplace is still a widespread problem that needs attention.) — this is correct, use another: 无论男性还是女性，应该都享有平等的职业发展机会。(Whether male or female, everyone should have equal career development opportunities.) — find the error
choices: 无论男性还是女性，都应该享有平等的职业发展机会。
无论男性还是女性，应该都享有平等的职业发展机会。
无论男性还是女性，都享有应该平等的职业发展机会。
无论男性还是女性，享有都应该平等的职业发展机会。

explanation.en: The fixed pattern requires 是因为 in that order, not 因为是.
explanation.ko: 고정 문형은 '因为是'가 아니라 '是因为' 순서여야 한다.

questions.prompt: 这家公司之所以能吸引优秀的女性人才，因为是营造了公平的职场环境。(This company was able to attract outstanding female talent precisely because it created a fair workplace environment.) — find the error
choices: 这家公司之所以能吸引优秀的女性人才，是因为营造了公平的职场环境。
这家公司之所以能吸引优秀的女性人才，因为是营造了公平的职场环境。
这家公司之所以能吸引优秀的女性人才，是营造因为了公平的职场环境。
这家公司之所以能吸引优秀的女性人才，营造是因为了公平的职场环境。

explanation.en: The particle 「的」at the end is unnecessary and breaks the sentence; 消除性别薪资差距 is already a complete verb-object phrase without 的.
explanation.ko: 문장 끝의 「的」는 불필요하며 문장을 어색하게 만든다. '消除性别薪资差距'는 이미 완전한 동목구이므로 '的'가 필요 없다.

questions.prompt: 这家公司承诺实现同工同酬，消除性别薪资差距的。(This company promised to achieve equal pay for equal work, eliminating the gender pay gap.) — find the error
choices: 这家公司承诺实现同工同酬，消除性别薪资差距。
这家公司承诺实现同工同酬，消除性别薪资差距的。
这家公司承诺实现同工同酬的，消除性别薪资差距。
这家公司的承诺实现同工同酬，消除性别薪资差距。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 无论男性还是女性，都应该享有平等的职业发展机会 ("Whether male or female, everyone should have equal career development opportunities").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '无论男性还是女性，都应该享有平等的职业发展机会' (남성이든 여성이든 평등한 경력 개발 기회를 누려야 한다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 无论男性还是女性，__________享有平等的职业发展机会。(Whether male or female, everyone should have equal career development opportunities.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 这家公司之所以能吸引优秀的女性人才，是因为营造了公平的职场环境 ("This company was able to attract outstanding female talent precisely because it created a fair workplace environment").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '这家公司之所以能吸引优秀的女性人才，是因为营造了公平的职场环境' (이 회사가 우수한 여성 인재를 유치할 수 있었던 것은 공정한 직장 환경을 조성했기 때문이다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 这家公司之所以能吸引优秀的女性人才，__________营造了公平的职场环境。(This company was able to attract outstanding female talent precisely because it created a fair workplace environment.)
